◎简　　介  

　　Following the sell out tour and triumphantly successful album 'The Emancipation of Mimi', Mariah Carey releases the highly anticipated tour DVD 'The Adventures of Mimi'.The tour, produced by Ken Ehrlich, played to packed houses across the States, Canada and Japan.
